items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Blue sign shows arrows straight + left (lane allowing straight or left turn). No existing candidate QID clearly encodes 'go straight and turn left' exactly, so create new question; correct local option = A.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0884 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: Options reordered; French key B (Detention and fine) maps to master C (criminal detention and a fine). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Source blue mandatory sign means go straight and turn left; no existing qid safely matches that exact sign/option row. Keep source image and create new with local answer C.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Blue circular sign with a white arrow pointing down-right could mean 'keep right' or 'turn right' depending on local sign convention; source options include both interpretations (B vs D).
